note: Images for this build were generated with the environment's Gemini-backed image tool and saved as .png (1024x1024). If regenerating with the standard Gemini pipeline, target the aspect ratios/resolutions below and convert to .webp, then update HTML/CSS references from .png to .webp.
model: gemini image model (env-provided) — confirm current model at ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models before regenerating

images.prompt: Wide 16:9 photorealistic hero image for a home services digital marketing company. A confident marketing professional reviewing rising analytics dashboards and a website mockup on a large monitor in a bright modern office, warm orange accent lighting, sense of growth and momentum. Cinematic, high contrast, professional. No text, logos, or watermarks in the image.

Wide 16:9 photorealistic image representing Google Ads management for home service contractors. A search results page glowing on a laptop with an upward click-through graph and a smartphone showing an incoming call, warm modern office, orange accent light. High contrast, professional. No text, logos, or watermarks in the image.

Wide 16:9 photorealistic image representing Facebook and social media advertising for home service businesses. A social feed on a phone with an engaging local-business ad and rising engagement icons, homeowner scrolling, bright warm setting, orange accent light. High contrast, professional. No text, logos, or watermarks in the image.

Wide 16:9 photorealistic image of a sleek high-converting home-services website displayed across a laptop, tablet, and phone on a clean desk, warm orange accent lighting, sense of trust and professionalism. High contrast, professional. No text, logos, or watermarks in the image.
